allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://plugins.gradle.org/m2/org/springframework/boot/spring-boot-gradle-plugin/3.3.4/spring-boot-gradle-plugin-3.3.4.pom' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; "plugins.gradle.org: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "plugins.gradle.org ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2/org/springframework/boot/spring-boot-starter-web/3.3.4/spring-boot-starter-web-3.3.4.pom' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; "maven central: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "maven central ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
